title: Report on the proposed Automotive Transformation Grants scheme
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DBT concerning the proposed Automotive Transformation Grants scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of DBT’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the Automotive Transformation Grants scheme by the Department for Business and Trade  "
